summary: Commercial Profiling + Reward Safety + Numbering Rules Pack testing completed. 17/18 backend tests passed (1 minor test failure due to missing default config for preview). All frontend pages load correctly. APIs verified working via pytest.

minor.issue: Returns 400 for quote/order when config only has invoice_format (test updated invoice only). Default config should be returned if specific format not found.

integration_issues.flow: Business Pricing Request submission from dashboard
integration_issues.issue: 401 error during form submission - token might not be properly stored or sent. API works correctly when tested directly via pytest.
integration_issues.note: Backend API works correctly, issue is frontend token handling

auto_numbering_page.notes: Page loads with all document type editors (Invoices, Quotes, Orders, SKUs, Delivery Notes, GRN). Save Changes button works. Preview buttons available.

auto_numbering_api_preview.notes: Returns preview with document_type, preview string, current/next sequence

business_pricing_request_page.notes: Page loads with Company Information form, Products of Interest checkboxes, Services of Interest checkboxes, What you'll get sidebar

business_pricing_request_api.notes: API works correctly via pytest - creates request and lead

business_pricing_cta.notes: Request Business Pricing link present in CustomerPortalLayoutV2.jsx

first_order_discount_api.notes: Issues 5% discount code with WELCOME- prefix, minimum order TZS 50,000

first_order_discount_validate.notes: Validates code, email, and minimum order amount

points_rules_validate_redemption.notes: Calculates gross_margin, protected_margin, distributable_margin, max_points_redemption_amount. Points capping works correctly.

sales_guided_questions_api.notes: Endpoint works, requires staff auth and valid lead_id. Calculates qualification_score.

admin_navigation_auto_numbering.notes: Auto-Numbering link present in adminNavigation.js under Configuration section

action_items: MINOR: Add fallback to default format in auto-numbering preview endpoint when specific format not found
MINOR: Investigate frontend token handling for Business Pricing Request form submission (API works correctly)
critical_code_review_comments: Auto-Numbering routes properly use get_default_config() fallback for GET config, but preview endpoint doesn't have same fallback
First Order Discount correctly issues 5% (not 10%) per reward safety requirement
Points rules service correctly calculates margin protection (40% protected, 10% cap of distributable)
Sales Guided Questions component has good UX with progress tracking and priority indicators
Admin navigation correctly includes Auto-Numbering under Configuration section
Business Pricing CTA is present in CustomerPortalLayoutV2 sidebar
seed_data_creation: Test business pricing requests created with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: Commercial Profiling Pack APIs all functional. Auto-Numbering page accessible at /admin/auto-numbering under Configuration. Business Pricing Request page at /dashboard/business-pricing. First Order Discount issues 5% codes. Points validation correctly caps at 10% of distributable margin (40% protected). Navigation links correctly configured.
